text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking a stroll in the park on my day off,
when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Argh?! Y-you have to be kidding me... Am I in the
first circle of hell?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ah, my salvation! I beg you, Trainer, rescue me
from the misery of these dark depths before I
succumb to misfortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was feeling groggy and dozed off on the
bench... I only just woke up! That's when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I heard a crow caw four times above my head!
That's definitely a sign things will take a turn for
the worse!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My mom always used to warn me to come back
home before the crow's first caw! It means danger
is just around the corner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an untimely encounter with an omen of
misfortune, Matikanefukukitaru seems to be
completely drained of energy...
